chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No.S-843 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE. For hearing of post-arrest bail. 15.07.2025 M/s Ashok Kumar K. Jamba and Assadullah Soomro, Advocate applicant. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomr and Adnan Arshad Jatoi, SSP NAB Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General for State. ********** Learned counsel for applicant files copy of order dated 11.07.2025 passed by Special Judge Anti-Corruption (Provincial) Sukkur Camp at Ghotki with regard to the Reference No.13/2020 re-The State v. Rahul Kumar and others under the cover of his statement dated 15.07.2025, and unreported judgment of High Court of Sindh at Karachi in C.P. Nos.6400/2022 dated 14.11.2022 which are taken on record. Learned Special Prosecutor submits that in view of decision of larger bench of this Court passed in Constitution Petition No.D-937 of 2025 this bail application is barred and has to be heard and decided by Constitutional Bench. Give the submissions counsel for applicant does not press this bail application and intends to file application before appropriate forum having jurisdiction in the matter. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB as well as learned Deputy Prosecutor General have no objection only to the extent of withdrawal of bail application. Both opposes the grant of bail. Bail application stands disposed of as withdrawn in the above terms. J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
